data.name: label1.Text
data.value:
YARR! No, dude, there is no campaign at all (sorry, but I decided to add it too late) But, fortunately, pirates keep their words. That is why, I created a small story about Magellan and his expedition, which wasn't usual as you know about it!
Some tracks I haven't added to game: 1. Big Ship Little Ship; 2. Alestorm; 3. P.A.R.T.Y.; 4. Wooden Leg Part II (The Woodening); And some else..... However, it is only remaster of my first game.... And, don't forget, I decided to keep my the most interesting ideas to realised on Unity. I am sure, it will be great! So, for the fans of the Fire And Sword - The Quest - ... P.S. I think, that this story is quite interesting and well thought out!

data.name: label2.Text
data.value: Let me tell you the story of Magellan, the glorious pirate, not the great navigator. I will tell everything that I know myself - everything that his team and I - the cabin boy on the ship Victoria - knew. But before we start... You should know that this story began much earlier than 1519. Fernand was born in Scotland and until the age of 16 he sailed on the ship of his father, a famous pirate in those waters. Everything changed when he was only 17. Father was caught and hanged. All this happened in front of his son. Despite his young years, the guy firmly vowed to take revenge. He was far from stupid not to understand that in such case, haste is a cr*ppy business.

data.name: label3.Text
data.value: First of all, he decided to settle in the country where his father was hanged - in Spain. Fernand spent the first years of his Spanish life in Madrid. It was not a luxurious life, but rather the horror of being among the same miserable as his father. But Magellan was a brave guy. He was NEVER afraid of the consequences. Only forward - he chose such a slogan. But he did not even imagine what a good chance he would have in the near future!

data.name: label4.Text
data.value: In 1518, the Ambassador of the Grand Duchy of Lithuania visited the Spanish King Charles the First. It turned out that the ambassador - his name was Miguel - found out very bad reasons for Castile to unite with Aragon. If you're an asshole, I'll explain. In 1479 the two states united. Until the moment of negotiations, the wedding of the heirs of 2 countries was considered the official and absolutely genuine reason for the union. But Miguel learned something more interesting: Castile pursued other goals. The country planned to destroy Aragon by marriage. That is, Castile wanted to gradually destroy the power of its ally. Since Charles was a supporter and practically the head of Aragon, having learned about such a betrayal, he first of all proceeded to entangle his ally-d*mbass. Charles generously rewarded Miguel and immediately ordered the construction of the most powerful fleet in the world! Yes, yes, the fleet. Charles the First decided to launch an offensive from the ocean.

data.name: label5.Text
data.value: For some 10 years, the whole flotilla was created. At this time, the former Castile (and at that time already part of the Spanish rich) had been trying to stealthily seize power. Slowly, slowly, but seize. In 1494, the collection of sailors began. And as you probably already guessed, both I and young Magellan got there. Let's not talk about me now. I was just a cabin boy on the new ship Victoria. Magellan all these years stubbornly tried to get out into the people. And he succeeded in becoming a sailor. On the ship Victoria. The fact is that King Charles the First died. And with him, the ideas of seizing power also went to the grave. After all, they all considered Charles the First to be their support, which did not guess anything. But as you already know, this was far from the case.

data.name: label6.Text
data.value: The year 1519 came unnoticed. September. By that time, we were already friends with Fernand. I remember that day very well. September 18th. We are told that we are obliged to attack the nearest borders of the former Castile in 3 days. All these years we remained sailors, but I still did not know that the war was going on. Later it turned out that we were sailing even earlier - on September 20th. This day was bloody. The devil himself knows how hard it is for me to talk about this. Yes, me and my best friend and 47 other thugs have captured Victoria. Yes, we killed them mercilessly. And all for the sake of one man, whose father was killed many years ago.... I don’t know how, but we stormed this ship the night before we sailed. Probably Magellan did not forget his father's lessons. The Aragonese raised the alarm too late - we were already very far away and shot them with cannons. And it was at that moment - I remember it very well - that I suddenly realized where my life was heading and what would happen to me when I arrived in most countries of the world. With these thoughts, we began to discuss a further plan of action.

data.name: label7.Text
data.value: But the rest of the story is known to many. We decided to become pirates. Just like Magellan! It sounded proud! And we swam as far as we could. There, in America, we found new islands, treasures, natives, glory and filled the void of our hearts with these things after the Bloody September, 20! And then........the further we plunged into our passions, the clearer the curse became! Yes, curse! Curse for sins! By the end of 1521, we no longer even felt the breath of the wind, the touch, the sweetness of food and the wealth of those heavenly and hellish lands!

data.name: label8.Text
data.value: Magellan died.. In terrible agony... At night we heard his cry! Piercing! He stood on the ocean shore with his arms outstretched. Running out, I saw the KRAKEN for a moment. It wasn't big, but it wasn't small either. He abruptly emerged from the water and jumped right to Fernand! F*ck him! We thought. And sailed away from the islands without him like cowardly rats. We, too, could suffer such a fate, so we surrendered to the Spaniards. It was embarrassing, scary and painful. But we could not live without them, but the feeling of guilt was enormous...... Yes, we did not take Magellan back. We were afraid, we were afraid of the curse very much. We thought that Fernand would get us even in Spain, so we couldn't stand it psychologically. We gave up.

data.name: label9.Text
data.value: After listening to us, the Madrid authorities immediately decided to hang us. But after they heard about the path along which we sailed, they decided that we had found another continent with huge gold reserves. In a short time, expeditions were formed to those islands whose names I don’t remember, but I always remembered those places..... We were pardoned and instead of being hanged ........ we were imprisoned for our lifes! And we became prisoners. Me and 17 other people whose souls remained on those unknown islands. All of our history has been rewritten. Magellan turned out to be not a pirate, but a great navigator who made the first trip around the world for his country and also found huge reserves of gold on other lands. That is my story. The story of a pirate who was afraid of curses and death. The Story of a repentant pirate. The story of Juan Sebastian Elcano!

data.name: label10.Text
data.value: Understand that pirates are not only brave and desperate villains. Unfortunately, some pirates are cowardly and dishonest. Therefore, always remember the cost of your actions and become a pirate only if you have honor, a little madness, courage and other character traits of the winners! A pirate sounds proud, so don't let that title down!
